text: Hello! I'm your Solar Assistant ☀️ How can I help you today?
Show me today's energy production.
Your system produced 3.42 kWh so far today. This is 12% higher than yesterday.
Why is voltage fluctuating?
Voltage variations are normal during rapid irradiance changes. Cloud shadows can cause brief dips.
What about efficiency right now?
Current efficiency is 22.7%. This is within expected operational range for this time of day.
Is the system healthy?
Yes. All metrics indicate stable operation. No anomalies detected in the last 24 hours.
By the way, sunlight intensity is trending upward. Expect increased production in the next hour.
How’s the weather?
Currently: Sunny ☀️, 23°C. Cloud cover: 12%. Wind: 2.1 m/s. Conditions are ideal for peak generation.
Give me a summary of the last hour.

In the last hour:
• Avg power: 421 W
• Peak power: 563 W
• Energy gained: 0.54 kWh
• Efficiency: +2.3% compared to previous hour.
Any warnings?
⚠️ No current warnings. The inverter temperature peaked slightly but remained within safe limits (41°C).
I’ve also noticed that your solar elevation angle is increasing. Good production window ahead.
What's solar irradiance right now?
Solar irradiance is 842 W/m². This level typically yields high power output.
Give me a prediction for the next 3 hours.
Based on irradiance forecast: Expected production ≈ 2.1–2.8 kWh in the next 3 hours.
Tip: If you want more granular data, I can show 5-minute intervals or inverter-side readings.
What caused the energy spike earlier?
At 10:17 AM, a sudden drop in cloud density increased solar exposure, causing a short 11% spike in power output.
Can I compare today with yesterday?
Sure. Today’s energy output is 18% higher so far. Yesterday had intermittent cloud coverage between 11 AM and 2 PM.
How much light is detected?
Light intensity is at 76%. This corresponds well with the irradiance level.
What's the current power?
You're generating 498 W right now.
Give inverter status.
The inverter is operating normally. No fault codes. Efficiency at DC–AC conversion is 96%.
FYI: Nominal power setting is still at 2500W. You can adjust it if you want optimized projections.
Check battery?
Your system does not include a battery module. If you'd like to add storage analytics, I can integrate support.
What's the sunlight elevation?
Solar elevation is currently 37°. Expect maximum elevation at 12:48 PM.
Give me a full report.

Here's your summary:

• Power: 498 W
• Voltage: 42.1 V
• Current: 11.8 A
• Solar Irradiance: 842 W/m²
• Efficiency: 22.7%
• Temperature: 23°C
• Weather: Sunny

Everything looks optimal.
Let me know if you'd like exported data or PDF reports.
Thanks!
Always happy to help ☀️
